anonymous_id_tooltip: You can generate one by signing up anonymously
save_it_youll_need_it_to_log_in: Save it - you'll need it to log in.
create_a_standard_account_signup: Create a standard account? Sign up
dont_have_an_account_signup: Don't have an account? Sign up
enter_your_details_below_to_login: Enter your details below to login
enter_your_password_below: Enter your details below to login
keey_this_pseudonymous_id_safe: Keep this pseudonymous id in a safe place!
reset_password_body: No worries, we've got your back! Enter your email so that we can send you a password reset link.
password_reset_instructions_body: We've sent a password reset link to your email.
password_reset_success_body: Your password has successfully been updated. You can now login to join a conversation.
title: Title
short_description: Enter a short description of the conversation
description: Enter a fuller description of the conversation
enter_a_title_for_the_conversation: Enter a title for the conversation
image_url: Enter a url for the conversation. These should be a good resolution and engaging
video_url: If a video intro for the conversation, please enter it here
is_public: Should the conversation be shown of the home and search pages?
is_invite_only: Should participation in this conversation be by invite only?
other_ways_to_learn_about_this_conversat: Other ways to learn about this conversation
landing_page_subtitle: A platform where communities join conversations, share ideas, reflect together, and help shape better decisions.
find_open_conversations: Find open consultations that you can participate, or search topics that interest you the most.
agree_to_tos: By signing for an account you agree to our
signup_subtitle: Sign up and let's keep you posted.
we_are_interested_in_hearing_what_is_goo: Let us know what you think about this experience, including the questions, the website, or the topic.
verification_message_heading: We have sent you an email
verification_message_body: Click on the verification link we have sent to your email address.
verification_email_sent: Verification email re-sent. Please check your inbox.
verification_email_missing: Didn't receive the email yet? Check your spam folder or
verify_error_message: Something went wrong re-sending verification email.
verify_missing_user: Please try logging in. You will be notified at a later date to re-attempt email verification.
verify_user_pending_body: Click on the verification link we have sent to your email address.
verify_user_success_body: You can now join a conversation
verify_user_error_body: Something went wrong verifying your email address. Try logging in.
verify_user_conflict_error_body: Your email address has already been verified. You can now view and join conversations.
welcome_to_comhairle_community_server: Welcome to the Comhairle Community Server
community_server_description_1: At CrownShy, we believe that communities of all shapes and sizes benefit from listening more closely to their members and learning to govern themselves more effectively.
community_server_description_2: To help realize this future, we run this community server.
polis_tip_agreeable: An opinion should be answerable with "agree" or "disagree"
polis_tip_one_idea: Include only one idea at a time in one opinion
polis_tip_no_jargon: Avoid use of jargon (if necessary, try to unpack with plain language)
polis_opinion_submitted: Your opinion has been submitted. Thank you!
polis_voted_everything: You have voted on everything. Thank you!
polis_come_back_later: Come back later to see if new statements have been added.
